subcodes.title: Words to Kinney, Beede, Thompson party, spoken on 1909-07-09
subcodes.first_line: Music is one of the important arts. It has a great effect upon the human spirit. Musical melodies are a certain something which prove to be accidental... Music is an important means to the education
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @music and singing, @Greek philosophers; Greek civilization, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar]
